sections.paragraph:
prop. diffusion (see the root פָּסַס No. II ), figuratively, abundance; found once. Psa 72:16, יְהִי פִּסַּת בַּר בָּאָרֶץ “let there be abundance of corn in the earth.” Others take it as the fem. of the form פַּס, hence a handful. Kimchi, מְלֹא כַף, which may do if it be taken collectively: [or still better if taken simply, a handful of corn, from which, vast returns are obtained, see the context].

I.
